theme.domain: Finance / Budgeting Mobile App (React Native Expo)
theme.mode: Hybrid (User Toggleable Light and Dark Mode)

headings.usage: Use massive sizes (text-5xl, text-6xl) for the daily allowance number ('Jatah Hari Ini') and status tags. Extremely tight tracking.

body.usage: Clean, highly readable text for lists, dates, and small labels.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, touch-friendly bento vertical flow. Generous padding (p-6 to p-8) inside major containers to avoid text collision.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl. In neo-brutalism, we mix soft corners with hard thick borders and solid drop shadows.

quick_expense_buttons.name: Super Fast Expense Input Grid
quick_expense_buttons.description: Grid of 4 chunky buttons (10k, 20k, 50k, 100k) for lightning-fast entry.
quick_expense_buttons.style: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border-2 border-black dark:border-white p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-[4px_4px_0_#111] dark:shadow-[4px_4px_0_#FFF] active:translate-x-1 active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none flex items-center justify-center

dashboard_card.name: Daily Allowance Dashboard
dashboard_card.description: Hero section. The background color dynamically changes based on Budget Health Status (Aman=Green, Panas=Yellow, Rem=Orange, Boncos=Red).
dashboard_card.style: border-4 border-black dark:border-white p-8 rounded-[32px] shadow-[8px_8px_0_#111] dark:shadow-[8px_8px_0_#FFF] mb-8
dashboard_card.typography: text-5xl or text-6xl font-black font-outfit tracking-tighter text-black dark:text-black (ensure text is always black on these bright backgrounds for contrast)

budget_health_tag.description: A thick, pill-shaped tag indicating the current status.
budget_health_tag.style: inline-flex px-4 py-2 bg-black text-white dark:bg-white dark:text-black rounded-full uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs font-bold font-outfit

expense_history_item.description: List item for past expenses with swipe/delete functionality.
expense_history_item.style: flex flex-row items-center justify-between bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 border-2 border-black dark:border-white p-4 mb-4 rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0_#111] dark:shadow-[4px_4px_0_#FFF]
expense_history_item.delete_button: bg-red-500 border-2 border-black p-3 rounded-lg shadow-[2px_2px_0_#111]

interactions.buttons: Mobile native feel. Rely on `TouchableOpacity` (or NativeWind's `active:` pseudo-class) to trigger the press down effect: the hard shadow collapses (`shadow-none`) and the box translates down and right (`translate-x-[4px] translate-y-[4px]`).
interactions.animations: Use snappy layout animations. Avoid slow web-like fades.

status_aman.description: Cool character with sunglasses and money. Use when status is 'Aman' (Safe).

status_agak_panas.description: Sweating character. Use when status is 'Agak Panas' (Warm).

status_rem_dikit.description: Panicked character pulling handbrake. Use when status is 'Rem Dikit Bos' (Brake a bit).

status_boncos.description: Crying character with empty wallet. Use when status is 'Boncos Total' (Broke).

testing.requirements: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` attribute (React Native's equivalent of data-testid). E.g., `testID="quick-expense-10k"`, `testID="daily-allowance-display"`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for React Native Expo using NativeWind. Map web tailwind rules to mobile equivalents.
Do NOT use TypeScript. All files must be .js/.jsx.
Implement Google Social Login using Expo AuthSession or equivalent standard for RN.
The core logic must immediately recalculate: jatah_harian = sisa_saldo / sisa_hari_menuju_refill.
The app has a dual-language toggle (Indonesian & English). Ensure UI layout supports both without breaking.
Use the generated illustrations inside the Daily Allowance Dashboard or in empty states to add emotional weight to the budget status.

Ensure the Neo-Brutalist shadow technique works in RN. If NativeWind's box-shadow fails, use a wrapper `View` with absolute positioning, an offset, and black background to simulate the hard edge shadow.
